task_completion.description: The agent opens and views the USPTO formatting requirements specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer window displaying the contents of 'uspto_formatting_requirements.txt'.

task_completion.description: The title and main section headings are formatted distinctly from the body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Calligra Words, the title ('ELECTROCHEMICAL WATER PURIFICATION SYSTEM...') and section headers (e.g., 'Background of the Invention', 'Summary of the Invention') have formatting applied such as bolding, centering, or capitalization according to the spec.

task_completion.description: The body paragraphs are formatted according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Body text paragraphs (e.g., 'The present invention relates generally...') show applied formatting such as specific line spacing (e.g., double spacing), paragraph indentation, or margin adjustments in Calligra Words.

task_completion.description: The Claims section is formatted with a clear hierarchical structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Claims' section in Calligra Words, the claims are numbered and show hierarchical indentation (e.g., dependent claims are indented further than independent claims).
The agent clicks the 'Save' icon in Calligra Words, uses the File > Save menu, or the window title bar indicates the file is saved (e.g., no unsaved changes asterisk next to the filename).

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words graphical interface to apply formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting text, clicking formatting buttons on the Calligra Words toolbar, or using GUI dialogs, rather than running terminal scripts to modify the .odt file.

integrity.description: The agent used Calligra Words as specified, not an alternative word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window where formatting occurs is clearly Calligra Words, not LibreOffice Writer or another program.

integrity.description: The original text content of the patent application was preserved during formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific title, section headers, and keywords (e.g., 'graphene-oxide', 'membrane fouling') remain intact and were not deleted or replaced with placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patent application title is 'ELECTROCHEMICAL WATER PURIFICATION SYSTEM USING GRAPHENE-OXIDE COMPOSITE ELECTRODES'. Expected main sections include 'Cross-Reference to Related Applications', 'Field of the Invention', 'Background of the Invention', 'Summary of the Invention', 'Brief Description of the Drawings', 'Detailed Description of Preferred Embodiments', 'Claims', and 'Abstract'. Key content includes phrases like 'graphene-oxide', 'membrane fouling', and 'recirculation'. The task explicitly requires hierarchical formatting for the Claims section.
